summary: Replayed ADR 0105 from the latest origin/main integration branch, verified the live LV3 capacity dashboard and capacity-report entrypoints end to end on monitoring-lv3, and fixed the separate-worktree live-apply path by shortening per-run Ansible SSH control-socket directories while preserving primary inventory group vars for scoped runs.

verification.observed: Focused ADR 0105 validation passed on the mainline integration worktree with `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_ansible_execution_scopes.py tests/test_monitoring_vm_role.py tests/test_weekly_capacity_report_windmill.py tests/test_capacity_report.py tests/test_lv3_cli.py tests/test_promotion_pipeline.py -q` returning `67 passed`, plus `make syntax-check-monitoring` succeeding.

The fresh-worktree automation regression suite `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_run_namespace.py tests/test_ansible_execution_scopes.py tests/test_remote_exec.py -q` returned `20 passed` after `scripts/run_namespace.py` moved per-run Ansible SSH control sockets to compact `/tmp/lv3-acp/<token>` paths while `platform/ansible/execution_scopes.py` kept the primary inventory alongside shard inventories.

verification.check: Capacity report entry points and quota gate
verification.observed: `make capacity-report NO_LIVE_METRICS=true`, `make capacity-report`, `make weekly-capacity-report NO_LIVE_METRICS=true`, and `make weekly-capacity-report` all rendered successfully, and `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/capacity_report.py --model config/capacity-model.json --check-gate --proposed-change 20,8,100` rejected the proposed change because projected RAM commitment and vCPU commitment would exceed the target ceilings.

The official replay `BOOTSTRAP_KEY=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 make live-apply-service service=grafana env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true'` completed cleanly from the separate latest-main worktree with `ok=176 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=34`.

The public dashboard route `https://grafana.example.com/d/lv3-capacity-overview/lv3-capacity-overview` returned `HTTP/2 302` to `/login`, confirming the live route for dashboard uid `lv3-capacity-overview` while unauthenticated viewers remain gated.

notes: The first 2026-03-26 production replay from `codex/ws-0105-live-apply` imported and verified the capacity dashboard before a later transient SSH reachability failure in downstream blackbox verification; the immediate replay then completed cleanly with `ok=176 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=34`.

The first 2026-03-27 replay from the fresh latest-main worktree failed before host connection because the longer worktree path overflowed the default Ansible SSH `ControlPath`; the rebased implementation commit `2907637daca87ee2bb739c0dd821eee0834aa319` shortened those per-run socket directories and the official replay then succeeded from the same isolated worktree model.
Fresh worktrees do not include untracked `.local/` controller secrets, so the live apply used an explicit absolute `BOOTSTRAP_KEY` path from the main checkout.
